text: the woman in the red dress standing near the fountain
the small brown dog on the left side of the bench
the blue car parked behind the white truck
the tallest person in the group photo
the half-eaten pizza on the table closest to the camera
the cat sitting on top of the refrigerator
the yellow umbrella in the middle of the crowd
the child wearing a striped shirt who is pointing at the giraffe
the laptop on the desk next to the coffee mug
the bicycle leaning against the brick wall on the right
